description: CompositionRed cotton top with white ethnic print, round neck elasticated at the shoulders, raglan sleeves and elasticated waist with drawcordFittingComfortWash careHandwash in cold waterDo not machine washWash dark colours separatelyUse mild detergentDo not bleachDo not wringDo not tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryBlend ethnicity and style with this cotton top from wrangler. With a traditional pattern print in white on red fabric, this top is made for utmost comfort with the lightly elasticated neckline near the shoulder panel and the elasticated wasitline with a drawcord to customise the Fit. Team this with slim fit jeans or urban yoga bottoms and ballerina flats for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
